steps.title: Identify the setup
steps.content: The passage opens by defining “convergent evolution” using em-dashes before discussing how multiple scientists investigated this phenomenon and what questions remain unanswered.

steps.title: Match the function
steps.content:
The underlined portion gives a basic description of convergent evolution—the central phenomenon that frames the entire passage.

Readers must understand this definition before they can follow the discussion of genetic mechanisms and the research motivation.

The other choices misidentify what the definition does: it's not clarifying prior confusion (A), exemplifying how studies were conducted (B), or introducing a method of analysis (C).

That matches choice D — D is correct.
